title: BACKND Base rank and leaderboard flows
summary: Covers the current public rank route family for user and guild ranking flows, including settings lookup, score updates, list retrieval, my-rank lookup, reward access, and historical rank queries.
capabilities: route leaderboard questions to user or guild rank pages
explain that rank updates depend on underlying table rows and rank configuration
highlight the operational difference between viewing rank data and updating score-linked data
warn when rank routes are legacy-sensitive and may coexist with newer leaderboard naming
prerequisites: The target ranking already exists in the BACKND console
The caller has the correct rank UUID or a way to retrieve it
Any required table row for rank-linked updates has already been inserted
common_pitfalls: Treating rank updates like normal table updates and expecting leaderboard refresh without the rank-specific API path
Using the wrong table, row inDate, or rank UUID when updating score-linked data
Ignoring maintenance windows or counting periods that can block rank updates
public_notes: Use the rank route family as the stable public reference in this pack, even if newer leaderboard wording appears elsewhere.
Agents should verify the exact current API page before generating score update code because ranking features are version- and product-sensitive.
